subcodes.first_line: May thy service at the Divine Threshold be accepted and beloved, and thy toil and endeavor appreciated, God willing, evermore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدمتت در آستان الهی مقبول و محبوب و زحمتت و سعیت مشکور انشاء الله همواره
subcodes.subjects: @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
